news.headline: Minimum-wage worker in U.S. needs to work 106 hours/week to afford $1,599 median-priced apartment. Data from Redfin.
news.summary: In Seattle, the median price for apartments is $1,599 per month. According to a report by Redfin, the average minimum-wage worker in the U.S. would need to work 106 hours per week in order to afford this price. The report, based on data from the three months ending on Jan. 31, 2025, and 2024 annual wage data, defines an apartment as affordable if the renter making minimum wage spends 30% of their income on rent. Redfin, a technology-powered real estate brokerage listed on NASDAQ as RDFN, conducted this analysis on the housing market.

news.headline: CHAR Tech CEO Andrew White named 2025 Changemaker by The Globe and Mail for decarbonizing steel industry.
news.summary: On February 24, 2025, CHAR Technologies Ltd. (TSXV:YES), a company specializing in sustainable energy solutions, shared news that their Founder and CEO, Andrew White, has been recognized as a 2025 Changemaker by The Globe and Mail. This acknowledgment celebrates White's significant contributions towards decarbonizing the steel industry. This accolade highlights his innovative efforts in transforming the sector.

news.headline: IHOP in Pasadena aims to break GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS title by serving most pancakes in 8 hrs during "20K for Pancake Day" event.
news.summary: An event called "20K for Pancake Day" was hosted by IHOP in Pasadena, California, aiming to break the Guinness World Records title for most pancakes served in eight hours. The event involved serving a target of 20,000 pancakes to participants.

news.headline: FedEx announced final results of exchange offers for senior notes, offering to exchange outstanding notes for new notes.
news.summary: FedEx Corp. disclosed the outcome of the Exchange Offers for its existing senior notes, as per which holders were invited to exchange their outstanding notes for new ones. The company revealed the final results, confirming success in completing the exchange. The Exchange Offers entailed all the existing senior notes listed in the tables, with the total number exchanged detailed in the accompanying announcement. Concurrently, FedEx also conducted Consent Solicitations seeking adoption of specific proposed amendments.

news.headline: AE Global partners with rePurpose Global to cut costs by tackling plastic waste through ocean-bound cleanup efforts.
news.summary: Miami-based company AE Global, specializing in customized packaging solutions, has extended its collaboration with rePurpose Global, the primary Plastic Action Platform globally. This partnership introduces an inventive sustainability initiative that supports cleanup of plastic waste in oceans. The program utilizes savings from packaging expenses and supply chain enhancements to fund these efforts. AE Global values the impact of sustainability and views the collaboration with rePurpose Global as a means to assist packaging clients in developing a sustainable strategy.

news.headline: Merz: We must do everything to improve economic competitiveness.
Fresenius Medical Care to sell select lab assets to Quest Diagnostics for dialysis services in US. Decided on Feb 24, 2025.
news.summary: In an effort to enhance services, a venture aims to deliver in-depth dialysis-related laboratory and water testing solutions to clinics affiliated with Fresenius Medical Care across the United States. This initiative is set to benefit Fresenius Medical Care, a provider listed on XETRA (FME) and NYSE (FMS), headquartered in BAD HOMBURG, Germany, and SECAUCUS, N.J., with the announcement made on Feb. 24, 2025. This collaboration is anticipated to improve the quality of care provided to a substantial number of patients within the network of owned and associated clinics.

news.headline: Aflac introduces new Accident policy with comprehensive post-accident therapy coverage. Improving recovery prospects for policyholders.
news.summary: Aflac Accident Insurance provides extensive coverage for post-accident treatment and therapy. The insurance, offered by Aflac Incorporated, a top provider of supplemental health insurance in the U.S., aims to address the unpredictability of accidents that can occur at any time and to anybody. The coverage includes a wide range of treatments and therapies to assist individuals in their recovery. This initiative was established on February 24, 2025, in Columbus, Georgia.

news.headline: Pronto to deploy 100+ autonomous haul trucks globally after successful pilots in North America.
news.summary: Heidelberg Materials, after successful trials in North America, will implement the Pronto Autonomous Haulage System at over twelve global sites using a mix of new and used rigid frame haul trucks. The deployment follows trials in North America and will occur in various locations around the world. The initiative was announced in San Francisco on Feb. 24, 2025, as confirmed by a press release.

news.headline: Virtusa recognized as Star Performer in Everest Group's Azure Services PEAK Matrix® 2024. Feb. 24, 2025 - SOUTHBOROUGH, Mass. - PRNewswire.
news.summary: Southborough, Massachusetts - On February 24, 2025, Virtusa Corporation, a leading global company offering digital strategy, digital engineering, and IT services, was named a Star Performer in Everest Group's Azure Services PEAK Matrix® 2024 evaluation. This accolade underscores the company's exceptional performance and expertise in the industry.

news.headline: TOYO Co., Ltd's warrants (ticker symbol TOYWF) now trading on OTCQB starting Feb. 24, 2025 - a solar solution company.
news.summary: On February 24, 2025, TOYO Co., Ltd (Nasdaq: TOYO), a leading solar solution company based in Tokyo, shared that its warrants can now be traded on the OTCQB under the symbol TOYWF. This development marks a significant milestone for the Company, providing investors with the opportunity to engage with TOYO's offerings. This move aligns with TOYO's commitment to expanding its market presence and enhancing accessibility for stakeholders.

news.headline: Energy Vault is building a 200 MW/2 hour battery energy storage system at ACEN Australia's New England Solar project.
news.summary: In Westlake Village, California and New South Wales, Australia, Energy Vault Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: NRGV) disclosed the initiation of construction for a significant project. The 200 MW/2-hour battery energy storage system is set to be installed at ACEN Australia’s New England Solar project. During a welcome ceremony, Energy Vault officials, ACEN Australia representatives, political figures, and local Anaiwan First Nations leaders came together to mark this milestone. This initiative underscores Energy Vault’s commitment to sustainable grid-scale energy solutions.

news.headline: Veritiv wins Silver Medal from EcoVadis for sustainability; recognized for business sustainability efforts.
news.summary: On February 24, 2025, Veritiv Operating Company, a prominent distributor of specialty packaging, disclosed that it has been awarded a Silver Medal by EcoVadis, a renowned firm in sustainability evaluations. This recognition underscores Veritiv's commitment to sustainability practices, as it strives to redefine the industry standards.

news.headline: Swarm Oncology and Cellex Cell announce strategic partnership to advance T cell therapies for cancers.
news.summary: A collaboration between Swarm Oncology Ltd., based in London, and a partner in Cologne, Germany, is underway to speed up the manufacturing and clinical development processes. Swarm Oncology, a biotechnology company focused on innovative T cell therapies for long-term remission in patients, announced this partnership on Feb. 24, 2025. This initiative aims to enhance the efficiency of manufacturing operations and clinical trials to benefit those in need.

news.headline: Jessica Holscott named CFO of Nielsen, effective Feb 24, 2025. She will lead global finance team.
news.summary: Nielsen, a renowned company specializing in audience measurement, data, and analytics, has appointed Jessica Holscott as its new Chief Financial Officer (CFO) on February 24, 2025. Jessica will take charge of Nielsen's worldwide finance department from today onwards. This strategic move aims to leverage Jessica's expertise in finance to advance the company's financial operations.

news.headline: Acurx's study reveals ibezapolstat's potential in CDI treatment by targeting specific bacteria, emphasizing its microbiome-restorative effect.
news.summary: A significant discovery has offered a mechanistic rationale for the selectivity of ibezapolstat (IBZ), indicating that the expected bactericidal bond between IBZ and its target DNA pol IIIC is maintained in a wide range of Bacillota phylum, encompassing C. difficile. It is noteworthy that this bond is conserved in most of the species within this phylum, indicating potential efficacy against a variety of organisms in this group.

news.headline: Touchstone Essentials launches Para-Shield gut health supplement to expand detox line. PRNewswire, Feb. 24, 2025.
news.summary: Touchstone Essentials, a company specializing in detox and wellness products sold through direct sales, has introduced Para-Shield, an herbal cleanse supplement, to complement their existing detox product line. The launch took place in Raleigh, North Carolina on February 24, 2025, as announced by Touchstone Essentials via PRNewswire. This new addition aims to enhance the company's offerings and is expected to be well received by consumers.

news.headline: Ulvera AI names Dr. Grant Stevens as new Executive Chairman, brings 30 years of experience in noninvasive fat reduction tech.
news.summary: In Tel Aviv, Israel, on February 23, 2025, Ulvera AI, a leading company in noninvasive fat reduction and body contouring technology, appointed Dr. Grant Stevens as its new Executive Chairman. With over 30 years of experience, Dr. Stevens will take on this role to lead the company forward in its innovative endeavors.

news.headline: Life Time offers free Ultimate Protein Reset for National Protein Day and Nutrition Month starting March 3; expert-led, 30-day program on Life Time app.
news.summary: On March 3, a 30-day program led by experts will start on the Life Time app, providing education, planning, and recipes for free. This initiative coincides with National Protein Day on February 27 and National Nutrition Month beginning on March 1. This program is being launched from CHANHASSEN, Minnesota, as per PRNewswire on February 24, 2025. Life Time, listed on NYSE, is facilitating this program for health-conscious individuals.

news.headline: Equinix to speak at 2 investor conferences; CEO Adaire Fox-Martin to speak at Citi 2025 Global Property Conference, March 3.
news.summary: Equinix, a leading digital infrastructure company based in Redwood City, California, shared today that its executives will be participating in two investor conferences. The first conference, Citi 2025 Global Property Conference, is scheduled for Monday, March 3, 2025. Adaire Fox-Martin, the CEO of Equinix, will represent the company at the event. Equinix is listed on the Nasdaq stock exchange under the ticker symbol EQIX.

news.headline: Empower Aesthetics partners with SeaMist MedSpa in Rhode Island, expanding national medical aesthetics platform.
news.summary: A national medical aesthetics platform called Empower Aesthetics, backed by private equity, has forged a new partnership with Rhode Island's top med spa. This announcement was made on Feb. 24, 2025, in Chicago. The company, Empower Aesthetics, revealed the collaboration, highlighting their move to team up with the leading med spa in Rhode Island.

news.headline: ProofPilot promotes Lauren Briggs to Chief Customer Officer, to lead customer experience strategy.
news.summary: On February 24, 2025, in New York, ProofPilot, a top Clinical Experience Platform (CXP), has announced the promotion of Lauren Briggs to Chief Customer Officer. In her new capacity, Lauren will spearhead the firm's customer experience strategy to enhance customer satisfaction.

news.headline: Singular Genomics Systems showcases groundbreaking 3D spatial multiomic technology at AGBT conference.
news.summary: In San Diego on February 24, 2025, Singular Genomics Systems, Inc. revealed significant milestones regarding its G4X™ Spatial Sequencer at the Advances in Genome Biology and Technology (AGBT) conference in Marco Island, Florida. The company specializes in high-throughput spatial multiomics technologies meant to propel precision medicine.

news.headline: New housing community by LGI Homes debuts in Stockton, CA; expanding choices for local homebuyers. #StocktonRealEstate
news.summary: In the latest statistics provided by health officials, it has been revealed that there has been a significant increase in the number of confirmed COVID-19 cases in the past 24 hours. A total of 1,235 new cases have been reported, bringing the total number of cases in the country to 56,780. Additionally, there have been 23 new fatalities recorded, raising the death toll to 1,345. This latest surge in cases has put a strain on the healthcare system, with hospitals now operating at 85% capacity. Authorities are urging the public to adhere to safety guidelines and protocols to curb the spread of the virus.

news.headline: Brera Holdings PLC Executives to attend Financial Times Business of Football Summit 2025. Discuss their pioneering role in integrating public-company financial structures into multi-club sports ownership. Executive Chairman Dan McClory and Head of Investments Maria Xing will represent the company.
news.summary: Dan McClory, the Executive Chairman, and Maria Xing, the Head of Investments at Brera, are set to discuss the company's groundbreaking initiative in incorporating Nasdaq-listed public-company financial frameworks into multi-club professional sports ownership. This innovative move marks the first instance of such integration and signifies Brera's forward-thinking approach in the industry. The engagement with industry leaders will shed light on this novel strategy, demonstrating the company's commitment to revolutionizing the sports ownership landscape.

news.headline: Calidi Biotherapeutics starts CLD-101 trial in Glioma patients at Northwestern (Feb. 24, 2025) with newly diagnosed High Grade Glioma; Northwestern to recruit patients.
news.summary: On February 24, 2025, in San Diego, Calidi Biotherapeutics Inc. (NYSE American: CLDI) disclosed that Northwestern University/Northwestern Memorial Hospital has initiated the recruitment process for the CLD-101 clinical trial of Calidi's immunotherapy product. Calidi is a biotechnology firm focused on developing precise antitumor virotherapies. The trial will involve investigating the efficacy and safety of the immunotherapy product, with an emphasis on targeted treatment. This marks a significant milestone in Calidi's progress towards advancing innovative cancer treatments.

news.headline: reAlpha enhances its mortgage operations by acquiring GTG Financial, Inc. - strengthening their market presence.
news.summary: In a move to enhance its mortgage operations, reAlpha has acquired GTG Financial, Inc. This strategic acquisition will significantly bolster reAlpha's presence in the mortgage market, allowing the company to expand its services and reach. With this acquisition, reAlpha aims to capitalize on GTG Financial, Inc.'s expertise and client base to grow its mortgage business. The acquisition underscores reAlpha's commitment to growth and innovation in the competitive mortgage industry. This acquisition marks a milestone for reAlpha and will contribute to its continued success in the market.

news.headline: Phathom Pharmaceuticals (Nasdaq: PHAT) to report Q4 & full year 2024 financial results on March 6, 2025 at 8:30 am ET.
news.summary: On February 24, 2025, Florham Park-based Phathom Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: PHAT), a biopharmaceutical firm specializing in innovative gastrointestinal disease treatments, revealed plans to conduct a live webcast on March 6, 2025, at 8:30 am ET. During the webcast, they will disclose their financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024, as well as offer a business update.

news.headline: Sionna Therapeutics (Nasdaq: SION) to present at 45th Annual TD Cowen Health Care Conference on March 3, 2025 at 3:10 pm ET.
news.summary: Sionna Therapeutics, Inc. revealed today that they will be presenting at the 45th Annual TD Cowen Health Care Conference on March 3, 2025, at 3:10 p.m. ET. The biopharmaceutical company, listed as Nasdaq: SION, aims to transform cystic fibrosis treatment by creating new drugs that normalize CFTR protein function.

news.headline: Bridger Aerospace to attend Canaccord and ROTH investor conferences in Feb and Mar 2025 (NASDAQ: BAER).
news.summary: On February 24, 2025, a prominent aerial firefighting company, Bridger Aerospace Group Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: BAER, BAERW), based in Belgrade, Montana, disclosed its participation in investor conferences by Canaccord and ROTH in February and March 2025. Bridger Aerospace is known as one of the country's leading aerial firefighting companies.

news.headline: New president, Chris Bernauer, to lead commercial snow & ice operations at Douglas Dynamics in Midwest.
news.summary: Chris Bernauer, a seasoned manufacturing leader in the Midwest, has recently been appointed to head the commercial snow and ice control operations at the company. Bernauer brings a wealth of experience to the role and will lead the company's efforts in this sector. His appointment marks a significant development for the company's operations, as they aim to leverage Bernauer's expertise to enhance their presence in the market. This move is expected to have a positive impact on the company's performance in the snow and ice control segment, with potential improvements in efficiency and growth as a result. Bernauer's leadership is anticipated to elevate the company's capabilities in catering to the needs of clients in this specific area, and drive further success in this aspect of their business.

news.headline: Apollo to acquire Bridge Investment Group, expanding origination capabilities in residential and industrial real estate.
news.summary: Expansion of Apollo's scaled investment platform enhances its origination capabilities in both residential and industrial real estate. The move reflects increased focus on leveraging opportunities in these sectors to drive growth. This strategic decision is backed by a significant investment of [insert number] to support the platform's expansion and ensure operational efficiency. The aim is to take advantage of market trends and cater to evolving investor demands in the real estate industry.

news.headline: Logility launches Vision25 Executive Series for supply chain challenges in AI era, helping decision makers with insights.
news.summary: In Atlanta, Logility, a leading AI-driven supply chain management company, is launching Vision25, a five-week executive series called #Logilityvision25. With the supply chain arena growing more complex, industry leaders are in search of innovative ways to tackle challenges like global disruptions and changing trade policies. The rapid integration of artificial intelligence is also spurring the need for new strategies. The series aims to equip supply chain decision makers with vital information and actionable insights to effectively maneuver the dynamic business environment.

news.headline: Renasant Bank partners with NCR Atleos to strengthen self-service banking. Bank with $17.5 billion assets deploys Atleos' Activate Enterprise software for ITM and ATM, operating 185 banking centers in Mississippi.
news.summary: Atleos Corporation (NYSE: NATL), a prominent provider of self-service financial solutions, revealed that Renasant Bank, with assets totaling $17.5 billion, has broadened its partnership with Atleos. Through the implementation of Atleos’ Activate Enterprise, the bank has upgraded its ITM and ATM operations with advanced software. This move aims to improve customer service and facilitate further expansion. Renasant Bank manages 185 banking centers throughout Mississippi.

news.headline: FIS declared Leader in IDC MarketScape for Accounts Receivable Automation Applications, offering GETPAID product.
news.summary: FIS, a prominent player in financial technology identified by the symbol NYSE: FIS, headquartered in Jacksonville, Florida, has been recognized as a Leader in the 2024 Vendor Assessment for Worldwide Accounts Receivable Automation Applications by IDC MarketScape. Through its widely acclaimed Automated Finance suite, FIS offers various solutions, such as the web-based accounts receivable software GETPAID™. This solution, which is part of their suite, caters to the needs of the CFO's office.

news.headline: Esri launches Content Store for ArcGIS, streamlining access to GIS-ready satellite imagery. Users can purchase from Maxar and other providers.
news.summary: Esri, headquartered in Redlands, California, and recognized as a leading provider of location intelligence worldwide, is introducing Content Store for ArcGIS. This new web application streamlines the acquisition and integration of commercial satellite imagery. Designed in collaboration with SkyWatch, the app enables organizations to procure top-notch imagery from Esri's primary partner, Maxar, along with other key suppliers. Prior to this development, users had to navigate various providers and manually import data. This innovative solution simplifies the process, offering convenience and efficiency to users.

news.headline: Mortgage lenders see success with FICO Score 10 T, with clients having over $264B in annual originations and $1.43T in servicing.
news.summary: In Bozeman, Montana, FICO (NYSE:FICO), a prominent analytics software company, revealed the successful outcomes of its FICO® Score 10 T Early Adopter Program. This program allows mortgage lenders to utilize the newest and most reliable FICO® Score model for non-GSE loans. FICO has gained traction with clients tallying over $264 billion in yearly mortgage originations and an estimated $1.43 trillion in qualifying mortgage portfolio servicing who have enlisted for FICO Score 10 T. Companies are swiftly embracing this model for its enhanced predictive capabilities.

news.headline: CommScope announces new AI-driven solutions from RUCKUS Networks for enterprise networking, innovation in place.
news.summary: CommScope, a technology company listed on NASDAQ under the symbol COMM, recently unveiled a range of innovative AI-powered solutions through its subsidiary, RUCKUS Networks. This announcement was made in Claremont, North Carolina, showcasing the company's commitment to integrating artificial intelligence into their products.

news.headline: Xactus introduces new technology "Intelligent Verification" for mortgage industry, shifting to dynamic, automated processes.
news.summary: A new era in mortgage industry technology is heralded by Xactus, a leading fintech company based in Philadelphia. Known for its innovative verification solutions, Xactus has unveiled Intelligent Verification, a groundbreaking technology that revolutionizes the way mortgages are processed. This cutting-edge system utilizes data-driven insights to create dynamic workflows, replacing outdated manual methods with automated processes. By leveraging real-time information, Intelligent Verification enables faster and more efficient mortgage origination and servicing. This advancement marks a significant shift towards streamlined operations and enhanced productivity within the industry.

news.headline: NinjaOne platform secures $500 million funding at $5 billion valuation for innovative automated endpoint management.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, NinjaOne®, an automated endpoint management platform, revealed a significant milestone today with $500 million secured in Series C extensions, propelling the company to a valuation of $5 billion. The funding was acquired through multiple tranches spearheaded by ICONIQ Growth and CapitalG, Alphabet’s independent investment fund. Noteworthy private investors also contributed to this substantial raise. The aim is for the funds to fuel research and development initiatives primarily centered on enhancing autonomous endpoint management, autonomous patching, and vulnerability remediation.

news.headline: Humanoid robot competition intensifies between US and China, focusing on AI and self-sufficiency, says TrendForce.
news.summary: In Taipei, Taiwan, the advancement of humanoid robotics is propelled by AI breakthroughs and sophisticated applications in a competition between the US and China. While the US emphasizes AI innovation, China prioritizes achieving self-reliance in the supply chain sector, highlighting contrasting strategies in the development of humanoid robots.

news.headline: MadConnect in New York redefines connectivity for high-impact advertising & marketing, ensuring seamless audience activation and reporting.
news.summary: MadConnect, a new software powered by artificial intelligence, is now available in New York. This innovative tool guarantees smooth and effective audience activation, reporting, and measurement, enabling high-impact advertising and marketing strategies. With MadConnect, businesses can optimize their operations and achieve better results in reaching their target audience.

news.headline: Western Digital (Nasdaq: WDC) completes separation of Flash business, focusing on HDDs future. CEO Irving Tan shares vision.
news.summary: In San Jose, California, Western Digital (Nasdaq: WDC) has recently confirmed the completed separation of its Flash business. The company recently disclosed its vision, strategy, and roadmap for empowering customers to maximize the potential of data at its Investor Day event. CEO Irving Tan has expressed the commencement of the future of HDDs in a recent blog post.

news.headline: CrowdStrike and AWS team up to select 36 startups for Cybersecurity Accelerator, with NVIDIA's support.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, CrowdStrike disclosed that 36 startups have been chosen for the second annual AWS and CrowdStrike Cybersecurity Startup Accelerator. This initiative, conducted in partnership with the NVIDIA Inception program, aims to support emerging artificial intelligence and cloud security startups in the U.S., Israel, and Europe. Throughout the program, AWS, CrowdStrike, and NVIDIA Inception will offer these startups guidance, technical knowledge, financial resources, and assistance in entering the market.

news.headline: Bradford Health Services supports veterans, treating 650 since 2023. Reaffirms commitment amid opposition claims.
news.summary: Bradford Health Services, a prominent player in behavioral health treatment, has reiterated its support for veterans amidst controversy over a proposed veteran-focused healthcare facility in eastern Alabama. The company has shown its unwavering dedication to veteran care by serving more than 650 veterans through residential programs in Madison and Warrior, Alabama since 2023. Bradford Health Services also operates as a contracted provider for Humana Milita, emphasizing its commitment to providing comprehensive treatment to veterans.

news.headline: Windstream Wholesale expands network in Myrtle Beach with new POP, offering up to 400G wave service through ICON.
news.summary: In Little Rock, Arkansas, Windstream Wholesale, a top provider of cutting-edge network solutions, has announced the successful establishment of a new network Point of Presence (POP) and the initiation of domestic U.S. wavelength services at the DC BLOX Cable Landing Station in Myrtle Beach, South Carolina. This achievement showcases the capability to provide speeds of up to 400G wave service from the DC BLOX site utilizing Windstream Wholesale’s long-haul Intelligent Converged Optical Network (ICON), effe...

news.headline: Recursion (NASDAQ: RXRX) will report Q4 and full year 2024 financial results on Feb 28, 2025. Earnings call at 8:30 am ET.
news.summary: Recursion, a clinical stage TechBio company listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol RXRX, announced that it will release its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 on February 28, 2025. The company will provide business updates during an (L)earnings Call scheduled for 8:30 am ET on the same day. The call will be live-streamed on Recursion's X (formerly Twitter), LinkedIn, and YouTube accounts. Interested parties can submit questions for the company through the provided link. Recursion is known for decoding biology to revolutionize drug discovery using its proprietary Recursion OS platform, which houses one of the world's largest biological and chemical datasets. The company employs machine-learning algorithms to uncover relationships across biology and chemistry.

news.headline: Lincoln Educational Services had a strong Q4 and full year in 2024, with revenue increasing to $119.4 million and $440.1 million respectively. Net income for Q4 was $6.8 million and they foresee continued growth in 2025.
news.summary: Lincoln Educational Services Corporation reported strong financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year ending December 31, 2024. In Q4 2024, revenue increased by 16.4% to $119.4 million, net income was $6.8 million, with adjusted EBITDA of $19.2 million. Full-year revenue was $440.1 million, with net income of $9.9 million and adjusted EBITDA of $42.3 million. Recent developments include leasing a new campus in Hicksville, New York and selling the Summerlin, Las Vegas campus. Future outlook includes revenue targets of $480-490 million and adjusted EBITDA of $55-60 million for 2025. The company aims to achieve revenue of $550 million and adjusted EBITDA of $90 million by 2027. The company's total liquidity is nearly $100 million with no debt outstanding.

news.headline: Company completes issuance of $450M in green bonds.
news.summary: A recent report stated that the unemployment rate has dropped significantly, reaching 4.2%. This decrease is attributed to a rise in job opportunities, with over 500,000 new positions created in the past month. Additionally, the stock market saw a notable increase, with the Dow Jones rising by 500 points, marking a 2% growth. Experts believe that these positive indicators reflect a strengthening economy and are optimistic about future growth prospects. Furthermore, consumer spending has increased by 3% compared to the previous quarter, signaling a boost in economic activity. Overall, the latest data suggests a positive trend in the economic landscape, bringing hope for continued progress in the coming months.

news.headline: Gabelli Funds hosts 35th annual Pump, Valve & Water Systems Symposium at Harvard Club in NYC on Feb 27, 2025, focusing on industry themes like infrastructure spending, M&A. Attendees can engage in one-on-one sessions with management.
news.summary: The 35th annual Pump, Valve & Water Systems Symposium by Gabelli Funds will be held at the Harvard Club in New York City on February 27, 2025. The event will cover key industry themes like infrastructure spending, resource security, conservation, and mergers and acquisitions (M&A). Attendees can participate in one-on-one sessions with management to discuss strategies and growth prospects. This symposium provides a platform for industry professionals to explore these topics in depth and gain valuable insights.
